content.problemStatement:
You are given a sequence of integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​. You have to answer QQQ queries.

In each query, you are given two integers LLL and RRR, and you have to find the number of ordered pairs (X,Y)(X, Y)(X,Y) such that L≤X,Y≤RL \le X, Y \le RL≤X,Y≤R and AX≤AX⊕AY≤AYA_X \le A_X \oplus A_Y \le A_YAX​≤AX​⊕AY​≤AY​. Here, ⊕\oplus⊕ is the bitwise XOR operator.
constraints: the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 5⋅1055 \cdot 10^55⋅105
the sum of QQQ over all test cases does not exceed 5⋅1055 \cdot 10^55⋅105
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and QQQ.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.
Each of the next QQQ lines contains two space-separated integers LLL and RRR describing a query.
content.outputFormat: For each query, print a single line containing one integer ― the number of valid pairs.
